# v18.6 Sprite Direction Repair

- Rebuilt player sprite sheet with fixed row order: down, left, right, up.
- Forced player facing frames to clear tint/flip state and use correct directional idle frames.
- Rebuilt NPC sprite sheet with stable shirt colors.
- Changed NPC idle animations to single-frame idle poses so shirts no longer cycle colors.
- Preserved Phaser, v18.4/v18.5 gameplay, FireRed battle menu, hint-box fix, saves, scouting, recruiting, and deployment sync.
